data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. SCOTT ENIGMA found the frame for the second consecutive time when narrowly beaten into second last time out (22.56) over 390m at this track. Will find this more suitable and can atone. 5. SALLY SHINE jumped from this same draw and was close to the lead throughout before boxing on well and holding a 7 length third (22.61) at Warrnambool over 390m in a Bottom Up - Maiden. Harder here but will be in this for a long way. 1. ASTON ANTIBES turned in a plain effort last time when fifth at Shepparton over 390m behind Rocket Tattoo (23.13) in a Maiden. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Should be about the mark. 3. BLAME WALLY has top-three aspirations after placing here over this journey last time.","runners":[8,5,1,3],"exclusive":false}
